footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã khách hàng %s1 và địa chỉ %s2 đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục địa chỉ giao hàng.' else N'The record consisting of customer %s1 and address %s2 is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã khách hàng %s1 và địa chỉ %s2 đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The record consisting of customer %s1 and address %s2 has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_kh = @ma_kh and ((ma_dc like rtrim(@ma_dc) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_dc) like rtrim(ma_dc) + '%')) begin select 'ma_dc' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_kh)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_dc)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_kh = $ma_kh.OldValue and ma_dc = $ma_dc.OldValue) begin select 'ma_kh' as field, replace(replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s1', rtrim($ma_kh.OldValue)), '%s2', rtrim($ma_dc.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_kh <> $ma_kh.OldValue or @ma_dc <> $ma_dc.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (ma_kh = $ma_kh.OldValue and ma_dc = $ma_dc.OldValue)) and ((ma_kh = @ma_kh and ma_dc = @ma_dc) or (ma_kh = @ma_kh and ma_dc like rtrim(@ma_dc) + '%') or (ma_kh = @ma_kh and rtrim(@ma_dc) like rtrim(ma_dc) + '%'))) begin select 'ma_dc' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_kh)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_dc)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_kh = @ma_kh and ma_dc = @ma_dc
